title: Dendrochilum selebicum
taxonomy: Dendrochilum selebicum is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Dendrochilum, which is a group of terrestrial orchids native to Southeast Asia. The species is further categorized within the subtribe Malaxideae, a subtribe of the tribe Malaxideae. This orchid species is often found in tropical forests and is known for its unique and delicate flowers. By its classification, Dendrochilum selebicum is a rare and fascinating orchid species.
